commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can replace the direct DREAMS.md write with guarded atomic update behavior and add focused regression tests.; Needs attention: The patch introduces a new user-workspace DREAMS.md write path that bypasses the existing symlink/non-file guard.; Review finding: [P1] Reuse the guarded DREAMS.md writer — extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-markdown.ts:168 (sha=2dd2bc17b17a8735dab7e4160479abf35872dfaa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Deep Sleep managed block writer for DREAMS.md and calls it after the deep dreaming report write.

PR surface: Source +52. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main builds ranked/promoted Deep Sleep lines and writes them only to the separate deep report even though the docs promise DREAMS.md output. I did not run a live cron path in this read-only review.
